title: Decision: cast trigger stays in command-auto-yee, not in <yee-cast>
description: Confirm and document the trigger decoupling from the cast-yee README: <yee-cast> exposes a cast() method on the target but does NOT render a button. The trigger is a <button command='cast'> wired via command-auto-yee. This keeps cast-yee a pure behavior applier and exercises command-auto-yee's command wiring. Document the composable demo (cast-yee + command-auto-yee) that proves the factoring.

title: Adopt yee-goeth for graceful Presentation connection teardown
description: cast-yee was the first identified pressure point for graceful teardown. Adopt yee-goeth: on unapply, dispatch yee-goeth with reason='unapplied'; waitUntil() registers the final-frame flush + connection close. Use reason='ejected' for hard close (pagehide). Pairs with goeth-mix-integration and yee-v2-lifecycle. The first real consumer of yee-goeth.

title: cast becomes a yeetable transport
description: Refactor cast-yee into a transport plugin for yeetable. The Presentation API logic moves into a 'cast' transport that registers with yeet's transport registry. cast-yee's <yee-cast> becomes a thin wrapper that sets transport='cast'. Reduces duplication between cast and the other transports (postmessage, popup, webrtc). Pairs with yeet-cast-transport.
